case_title: BRE/RINCON LEASEHOLD LLC VS. PAUL FIORE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRE/RINCON LEASEHOLD LLC GLENBOROUGH REALTY TRUST INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRE/RINCON LEASEHOLD LLC GLENBOROUGH REALTY TRUST INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIORE, PAUL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 HOWARD ST. #1106, S.F. CA. 94105, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRE/RINCON LEASEHOLD LLC GLENBOROUGH REALTY TRUST INC. SERVED MAY-18-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FIORE, PAUL
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT FIORE, PAUL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT FIORE, PAUL
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRE/RINCON LEASEHOLD LLC GLENBOROUGH REALTY TRUST INC. ON DEFENDANT FIORE, PAUL
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE, $56.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRE/RINCON LEASEHOLD LLC GLENBOROUGH REALTY TRUST INC.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FIORE, PAUL

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRE/RINCON LEASEHOLD LLC GLENBOROUGH REALTY TRUST INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FIORE, PAUL DOES 1 TO 20,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
